Setup

Configure Gmail Auto Reply

Replies now use your built-in secure backend. Leave the writing fields blank if you want the A.I. to reply in its normal style, then just turn the safety switches on or off and click Save changes.

Reply Rules

Choose how the A.I. decides which emails deserve a reply.

Optional

You can skip these writing fields entirely and the extension will still draft replies using the A.I.'s normal style.

Use these writing fields only if you want to personalize your voice, add a signature, or teach the A.I. details about your business.

How The A.I. Should Reply

Use these fields to teach the assistant who you are, how you write, and what details it should remember.

Safety Switches

These apply even if you leave every writing field blank. Unread-only mode is now always on, so the automation only works through unread emails and can restart cleanly at any time.

Unread emails only This is always on. If an email is already read, the automation ignores it and moves on. Always on

Advanced Inbox Filters

Use these only if you want more control over who should or should not receive replies.

Current settings loaded.

Test Your Setup

This does not send anything. It runs a mock email through your latest saved settings so you can see exactly how the A.I. would respond.

Save first, then test. The sandbox always uses your latest saved configuration.

Mock Email

Paste a realistic email here and see whether the A.I. would reply, skip it, or leave it for you.

Ready to test.

Sandbox Result

Your test result will appear here.
